title: Tuesday Endurance Rebuild
objective: Rebuild bike frequency and aerobic volume after a disrupted, manual-labor weekend - the first real ride back, steady and aerobic, no intensity.
why_now: Bike-specific load has been low for two weeks and the weekend was 3h of digging and tree cutting. The re-entry rule rebuilds frequency and easy volume first, so Tuesday restores aerobic time and confirms the back and legs are ready before Wednesday's quality block.

source_context.week_objective: Re-entry and aerobic rebuild after a disrupted, manual-labor weekend

targets.notes: 60 minutes steady endurance at 58-70% FTP (~150-180 W). Aerobic by feel - able to talk in full sentences. No tempo, no chasing the climbs. Only 1h available today, so hold the cap.

warmup.notes: Ramp naturally into endurance and check that the back and legs feel normal after Monday.

steps.notes: Steady aerobic endurance. Smooth cadence, low force on any climbs, no surges. This is volume and rhythm, not a workout.

nutrition.pre: Normal meal timing. If hungry, 20-30g carbs 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst; a small carb top-up is optional on a ride this length.
nutrition.post: Normal meal with 25-35g protein and a carb serving.
nutrition.centr_recipe: No new Centr link needed; a normal recovery plate works.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Refuel, hydrate, and run the left-calf routine if it tightened.
recovery.evening: Protect sleep so Wednesday's quality block lands well.
recovery.next_morning_check: Wednesday's sweet spot proceeds only if the back is fine, legs feel normal, and sleep was acceptable. If any of those are off, ride Wednesday as endurance instead.

skill_focus.action: Hold one comfortable gear on gentle rolling terrain for 2 x 8 min and let cadence drift with the road, shifting only if power would exceed the endurance cap.
skill_focus.why: Smooth low-force pressure rebuilds aerobic durability and unloads the back/hips after digging, without turning an endurance ride into intensity.

mental_focus.why: Frequency and easy volume are what a re-entry week needs; chasing the missed sessions now would just deepen the hole.
mental_focus.reset: If you catch yourself pressing, exhale, shift easier, and ride 60 seconds below the cap before settling back in.

execution_notes.if_too_easy: Good - leave it easy. You may extend to 90 minutes if time allows and the back is fine, but keep it endurance.
execution_notes.if_too_hard: Cut to 60 minutes or stop if the back feels worse after 15 minutes.
execution_notes.success_criteria: Finished steady and loose, not tired, with the back no worse than before.
